raw_source.title: [Shanghai] Asia Regional HFT shop is looking for Trading System Engineer
raw_source.body:
## About
I 'm hiring for one of Asia's leading proprietary derivatives trading firms. Over 100 employees across Asia. Somehow easier the interview difficulty than 1-tier global HFT fund.

## Responsibilities
•	Develop low latency exchange connectivity and trading algorithms, including quoting, hedging, and arbitrage for listed derivatives and delta one products
•	Work closely with quants and traders to define the behavior of trading algorithms
•	Develop C++ applications for core trading infrastructure
•	Test code thoroughly including automated testing, and actively participate in code reviews

## Requirements
5 years C++ experience
985 Computer Science major
experience of working in a buyside or exchange


## Salary and Benefits
Base within CNY 1 million, bonus flotant

## Work Location
Shanghai, onsite, Huangpu District
HK, Wan Chai

## Contact
my wechat ID: ArcoDeTriunfo
**Please donnt say nothing after connecting. I dont need wechat user but I am happy to know friends.
